query: scratched dusty damaged old film negative photo
message: sub:film_artifacts/scratch_decay — anti_aesthetic — scratches, dust spots, chemical stains, tintype/wet-plate degradation

response.objective_caption: A grayscale photograph of a wall surface showing a dark, irregular stain slightly right of center, surrounded by faint scratches, small scattered marks, and subtle texture variations across an otherwise uniform gray field.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A grayscale photograph of a stained wall captured in flat, directionless light with oppressive low contrast and washed-out muted tones, where a dark irregular blotch sits slightly right of center amid scratches and scattered debris across a bleak monochrome plane, the grimy surface textures and heavy mid-gray palette emphasizing material decay and neglect.
